name: pi-zflow-workspace
description: pi-zflow — modular Pi harness customization suite — monorepo workspace

scripts.test:all: sh -c 'set -e; for pkg in packages/*/; do test_dir="${pkg}test"; if [ -d "$test_dir" ] && find "$test_dir" -maxdepth 1 -name "*.test.ts" -print -quit | grep -q .; then npx tsx --test "$test_dir"/*.test.ts; fi; done'
